data.draft-comment: This topic was generated using the Starter Topic Generator. Links have not been validated and some links may be pointing to the wrong version of a topic. Be sure to validate all links before publishing any of them.

section.title: Syntax
Hierarchy Level
section.codeblock: [edit logical-systems name routing-instances name routing-options flow], [edit logical-systems name routing-options flow], [edit logical-systems name tenants name routing-instances name routing-options flow], [edit routing-instances name routing-options flow], [edit routing-options flow], [edit tenants name routing-instances name routing-options flow]

section.title: Options
section.p: The remaining statements are explained separately. See CLI Explorer.
